items.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
items.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

items.title: Protests in Ukrainian cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
items.summary: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.

items.title: Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia
items.summary: Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 接連起火！福建晉江資源回收站祝融 距事故鞋廠僅數十公里
items.summary: 中國福建省泉州市晉江市的池店鎮唐厝村，今（16）日發生一起資源回收場火災。這也是繼晉江市匯騰鞋業有限公司後，該地區在短期內再度傳出的火災事故。  中國福建省泉州市晉江市池店鎮...…

items.title: 南海仲裁案10週年 作證美學者竟在菲律賓家中遭搶劫槍殺
items.summary: 定居菲律賓的著名美國海洋生物學家卡本特（Kent Carpenter），日前在家中遭槍殺身亡。他曾在2016年南海仲裁案為菲律賓作證，時值10週年，讓這起案件格外受矚目。菲國警...…

items.title: 報復美軍攻擊 伊朗擬命令葉門叛軍封鎖紅海
items.summary: 3名消息人士透露，伊朗已要求葉門叛軍「青年運動」（Houthis，或譯胡塞武裝）做好封鎖紅海的準備，一旦美軍攻擊伊朗電力設施，就發動封鎖攻擊。  2名伊朗高層消息人士及1名中...…
